description: The team arrives back in their original timeline, just before their jump to the past. Fitz gives final instructions, and the group splits up: FitzSimmons, Yo-Yo, and Sousa prepare to assist their past selves covertly, while others ready for their respective tasks. Sibyl's fleet scans for Zephyr One, preparing to attack, and the team braces for a tight operation to save Earth and ensure the timeline closes seamlessly.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: Everyone's clear on what needs to be done. You two go with Fitz and Simmons, retake the Lighthouse.
But first, you need to put these on. We'll arrive just before we left. So, believe it or not, there's unfinished business at the Temple. Yeah, I know. I don't believe it, either.
The Hunters are gonna be scanning for us everywhere.
Hang tight. We gotta wait for our moment.
Zephyr One is out there somewhere.
